name: ERP Version Detail
query:
SELECT
    cev.name AS "Doc No:Link/ERP Version:120",
    cev.upgrade_date AS "Doc Date:Date:120",
    cev.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer:150",
    evd.erp_component AS "ERP Component:Link/ERP Component:200",
    evd.current_version AS "Current Version::120",
    evd.upgrade_version AS "Upgrade Version::120",
    cev.status AS "Status::100",
    cev.expected_start_date AS "Exp Start Date:Date:120",
    cev.expected_end_date AS "Exp End Date:Date:120",
    cev.actual_start_date AS "Act Start Date:Date:120",
    cev.actual_end_date AS "Act End Date:Date:120",
    
    cev.maintained_by AS "Upgraded By:Link/Employee:150",
    cev.name1 AS "Name",
    cev.checked_by AS "Checked By:Link/Employee:150",
    cev.checked_by_name as  "Checked By Name"
FROM
    `tabERP Version` cev
JOIN
    `tabERP Version Details` evd
ON
    evd.parent = cev.name
ORDER BY
    cev.customer, evd.erp_component;
